title: STRL or HWM: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors looking for stocks in the Engineering - R and D Services sector might want to consider either Sterling Infrastructure (STRL) or Howmet (HWM). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?

title: STRL vs. HWM: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: Investors interested in stocks from the Engineering - R and D Services sector have probably already heard of Sterling Infrastructure (STRL) and Howmet (HWM). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?
